evidence_semantics.outcome_event_added: Remains true when an Outcome Ledger event exists.
evidence_semantics.evidence_added: True only when latest_evidence_weight is weak, early, moderate, strong, validated, or invalidated; false when latest_evidence_weight is none.
evidence_semantics.strong_evidence_added: True only for strong or validated evidence weights.
evidence_semantics.validated_evidence_added: True only for validated evidence weight.
evidence_semantics.future_movement_supported: Remains false when latest_evidence_weight is none.

limits: No generated strategy records mutated by this patch.
No ledger events created by this patch.
